description: Workshop project for machine learning with Python libraries and frameworks
Ignite your local AI projects with Ignis, a tool designed for seamless implementation and efficient management of machine learning models.
Anvil is a high-performance machine learning framework written in Rust, designed from the ground up for speed, parallelism, and control.
A dual-stage Machine Learning framework for customer income prediction and strategic segmentation using US Census data.
Badr is a framework for training fair machine-learning models that minimize a chosen fairness metric while preserving Pareto-optimal performance across sensitive groups.
A machine learning framework for detecting garbage in inland water using public complaints and satellite images
ustom torch style machine learning framework with automatic differentiation implemented on numpy, allows build GANs, VAEs, etc.
Enterprise graph machine learning framework for billion-scale graphs for ML scientists and data scientists.

This repo features the code, input and output files for my undergraduate thesis titled "Design and optimization of an integrated computational and machine learning framework to detect functional variants and elucidate their contributions to biological pathways".
Machine Learning framework for proactive risk management. Predicts high-risk departments using operational data and ensemble methods (Random Forest, GBM)

This project explores time series forecasting using powerful machine learning approaches: Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural networks, XGBoost regression, FbProphet using Tensor flow, Keras, Scikit Frameworks.

A Deepfake Detection Framework uses advanced machine learning techniques to analyze images, videos, and audio to identify AI-generated or manipulated content. It helps ensure digital media authenticity by detecting subtle inconsistencies that are invisible to the human eye.

Explores Machine Learning approaches for Quantum State Tomography (QST), featuring a Physics-Informed Neural Network (Cholesky-MLP) to reconstruct valid quantum states. This repository consolidates coursework (Assignments 1-3) into a scalable framework for benchmarking fidelity and runtime against classical linear inversion methods.

This repository provides the numerical framework for solving ill-posed inverse problems using a regularization strategy based on the parametrization of the solution via a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP). Unlike typical machine learning approaches, this method does not require training data and interprets the MLP as an implicit neural representation.

Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.
Machine Learning framework for cloud cost prediction and idle resource detection.
DistroML is an enterprise-grade distributed machine learning training framework designed to accelerate deep learning workflows across multiple GPUs, nodes, and cloud environments.

This is a repository for Quasi-Analytic Physics-Informed Machine Learning program for solving inverse problems of consolidation (i.e., diffusion PDE). The framework is designed to address field heterogeneity and measurement sparsity, which are major concerns for site characterization tasks in geotechnical engineering.
Interactive assessment framework for scoping AI, machine learning and data science projects for social good organizations.
This project implements an end-to-end framework for interacting with machine learning models through natural language style queries.

A comprehensive and extensible ontology for systematically modeling fairness notions, metrics, biases, evaluation methods, and scientific provenance in machine learning. This ontology provides researchers, developers, and practitioners with a unified, machine-readable framework to guide the design and assessment of fair ML systems.
probably approximately correct (PAC) learning is a framework for mathematical analysis of machine learning
An explainable, high-performance intrusion detection framework evaluating black-box machine learning models using SHAP and LIME.

This repository provides a complete end-to-end framework for forecasting hourly intraday electricity prices on the Iberian market and converting these forecasts into systematic trading strategies. The project integrates data engineering, advanced machine-learning models, hyperparameter optimisation, and algorithmic trading mechanisms.
Framework for  mass estimation of massive objects in astrophysical collision-driven systems using machine learning models
Synthetic dataset and code for: A Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for AI-Driven Sustainable Development (MDPI Technical Note)

This project is an AI-powered Digital Forensic Investigation Framework designed to detect anomalies in marine navigation systems. It leverages Python and Machine Learning for anomaly detection (such as GPS spoofing) and integrates Blockchain technology to ensure secure, tamper-proof storage of digital evidence.
A framework for conducting machine learning experiments in python

Machine learningbased inverse kinematics pipeline for robotic manipulators. The project uses neural networks, forward kinematicsaware loss functions, and joint constraints to predict joint angles from end-effector poses. Designed as a modular and research-oriented framework.
A machine learning-based framework to distinguish nuclear recoils from electronic backgrounds in gaseous NEWS-G-style detectors.
A novel hybrid quantumclassical machine learning framework designed to enhance the detection of collusive merchant fraud in financial systems.
An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.

Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.
Hardcore implementation of ML/DL algorithms from first principles. No high-level frameworks, just NumPy and Calculus.

Integrated multi-scale computational framework for SARS-CoV-2 RBD variant analysis. Combines homology modeling, molecular     dynamics (GROMACS), MM-PBSA binding energetics, and machine learning to predict ACE2/CD147 receptor affinity and immune       escape across 31 variants.

This application bridges the gap between complex machine learning and accessible health technology. It leverages state-of-the-art predictive modeling and explainability frameworks to provide transparent diagnostic insights.  The Predictive Engine: XGBoost At the core of this tool is an eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) classifier.
This project implements a hybrid machine learning framework for spam detection across multiple Online Social Networks (OSNs).

I'm a Results-driven Software Engineer with expertise in computer vision and machine learning applications. My journey in tech has been fueled by a passion for creating intelligent systems that solve real-world problems.  With a strong background in Python programming, deep learning frameworks, and image processing technologies.

Real-Time Anomaly Detection in IoT Networks is a streaming analytics framework that monitors IoT device data to detect anomalies, failures, and security threats in real time. It leverages statistical methods and machine learning to identify unusual patterns, trigger alerts, and ensure system reliability, safety, and operational continuity.
Pre-exposure risk assessment for SARS-CoV-2 using Serum protein  biomarkers. Machine learning framework (KNN+GA) with 5-protein panel.

This project presents a physics-inspired spacecraft telemetry simulation and anomaly detection framework that models power, thermal, and communication subsystems in Low Earth Orbit. It combines engineering-based thresholds and machine learning to analyze synthetic telemetry and study fault detection and spacecraft health monitoring.
Machine Learning based Dynamic Portfolio Optimization & Backtesting Framework for Indian Equities.

MLOptimizer is a comprehensive framework for automatically generating optimized machine learning models while capturing detailed hardware performance metrics. It provides a distributed system for model training, hyperparameter optimization, and hardware resource monitoring.
Engineered a machine learning pipeline that identify key drivers of air ticket booking and a predictive modelling framework that forecast premium lounge demand.

Machine learning framework for predicting shoreline segment lengths in Ireland using geospatial metadata. The project applies ensemble regression models with rigorous evaluation and explainable AI (SHAP, LIME), and deploys results through an interactive map to support data-driven coastal risk assessment and policy-relevant decision-making.

Aspiring Data Scientist | MSc Data Science & Analytics at Brunel University London. Specialized in Machine Learning, NLP, and architecting AI frameworks for large-scale data fusion (2.8M+ data points). Proficient in Python, R, SQL, and Tableau.

This repository contains the "Antigravity Modeling Framework" implementation for the Intelligent Systems Hands-On Badging Exam. The core philosophy of this submission is strict adherence to constraints ("Antigravity") to demonstrate a rigorous, scientific approach to machine learning.

An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

PhaseLearner is a modular machine-learning framework for extracting phase structure from many-body simulation data. Designed for DQMC and lattice models, it implements dimensionality reduction, latent-space analysis, and physics-informed deep learning models to locate critical parameters, identify symmetry breaking, and characterize emergent order.
A comprehensive framework for modeling the evolution of scientific knowledge through network science, machine learning, and computational epistemology.

A curated collection of high-quality learning materials, research papers, datasets, frameworks, and practical guides covering every major area of Artificial Intelligence  including Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Generative AI, Reinforcement Learning, and MLOps.

An image analysis framework, Fibril Analysis for Cellulose Technology (FACT), which utilizes machine learning (ML) segmentation and morphological thinning, to measure the fibril width distribution of cellulose nanofibers (CNFs) from negative contrast scanning electron microscopy (NegC-SEM) images. This application was developed in Mathematica V13.

HackGPT Enterprise is a production-ready, cloud-native AI-powered penetration testing platform designed for enterprise security teams. It combines advanced AI, machine learning, microservices architecture, and comprehensive security frameworks to deliver professional-grade cybersecurity assessments.

This project builds a dual-machine-learning framework that combines supervised classification and K-Means clustering to predict airline customer satisfaction and segment behavioral patterns, transforming ERP data into actionable insights for targeted experience optimization and operational improvement.
A Hybrid Physics-Informed Machine Learning (PIML) System for Iraqi Concrete Optimization. Integrating DoE, Transfer Learning, and Lean Six Sigma for Engineering Certainty. [Phase 1: EDA]
Framework for Data Science and Machine Learning
HLSFactory: A Framework Empowering High-Level Synthesis Datasets for Machine Learning and Beyond
Hybrid ensemble machine learning and deep learning framework for accurate and explainable software cost estimation.

Replication code for "A Term Structure Framework for Green Bond Spreads and Portfolio Strategies." Includes R scripts for curve-based green bond yield spread calculation, machine learning-based attribute screening via Association Rule Learning, and green bond portfolio construction and evaluation.
Translation exploration with Transformers and Machine Learning Experimentation Platfroms
A hybrid machine learning framework for reducing false negatives in breast cancer diagnosis using feature selection, ADASYN oversampling, and cost-sensitive XGBoost.
A Python framework for machine learning experiments in industrial machinery fault diagnosis through vibration analysis.

BioGraphX is a comprehensive framework for extracting biophysical features from protein sequences using graph-theoretical approaches. The system models proteins as interaction networks where residues form nodes and biochemical interactions form edges, enabling sophisticated feature extraction for downstream machine learning applications

Stylometric Fingerprinting: Writing Analysis and Authorship Detection Engine is a stylometry framework that identifies authorship by analyzing lexical, syntactic, and statistical features, including Burrows's Delta, and applying machine learning to detect distinctive writing patterns across texts.

LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing  powered by big data and machine learning.

This project provides a robust, machine learning-driven framework for identifying potential insider threats within an organization's digital ecosystem. The system analyzes user behavior, network activity, and data access patterns to proactively flag suspicious activities.AI Explainable Alerts and Role-Based Explanations

Capstone project for the Imperial College London AI & Machine Learning Certificate, showcasing end-to-end ML development  from data preparation to model training, evaluation, and insights using Python and modern ML frameworks.
Suplementary material for the article An Efficient Framework for Automatic Carbon Star Detection Using Machine Learning Techniques on LAMOST DR9 and Gaia DR32

Enhanced early-stage fairness analysis in machine learning by developing deep learning models and advanced word embeddings to classify sensitive features from user stories, improving accuracy and contextual understanding over existing frameworks like ReFair.

This repository provides the full methodological pipeline used in Promoting Inclusive and Resilient Cities for Social Stability: A Hybrid Machine Learning Approach to Urban Resilience. The code implements an integrated, interpretable modeling framework to measure urban resilience and social stability.
A hybrid CFDmachine learning framework that accelerates pore-scale reactive transport simulations
Plant Disease Detection using Machine Learning with its popular framework Pytorch.
This framework extends DEA by training ensemble machine learning models to predict DEA efficiency scores, enabling scalable, forward-looking efficiency analysis.

A machine learning project handling class imbalances and cost-sensitive learning towards improving fraud detection frameworks. In fulfillment of ML3301.

Including performance reviews, tenure, skill assessments, and training participation, we developed a predictive model using algorithms such as Random Forest, and Decision Tree etc,.
Predict traffic accident severity using advanced machine learning and explainable AI, enhancing road safety with clear insights from comprehensive data analysis.

AutoML Cash Flow Optimization for Insurance Companies is a machine learning framework that enhances financial forecasting and liquidity planning. It automates preprocessing, feature engineering, model selection, and hyperparameter tuning to deliver accurate cash flow predictions for data-driven decision-making.
